task_completion.description: Create a new sketch in the XY plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser or view orientation indicates that the active sketch group is on the XY plane.

task_completion.description: Draw a cubic spline with at least 6 control points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A curved line (spline) is visible in the sketch view with multiple control points (at least 6) along its path.

task_completion.description: Constrain the spline control points to the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Coordinate constraints or point properties in the property browser match the required waypoints: (0, 30), (28, 10), (20, -18), (0, -22), (-15, -8), and (-22, 18).

task_completion.description: Ensure the profile is a smooth, closed kidney-shaped curve with no sharp corners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawn spline forms a continuous, closed loop resembling a kidney shape, with no straight line segments or sharp intersecting angles.

task_completion.description: Extrude the sketch to a depth of 10 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D solid body is visible, and the property browser shows an Extrude group with a depth/thickness value of 10.

task_completion.description: Save the model as cam_plate.slvs in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the path /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/cam_plate.slvs, or the main window title bar displays 'cam_plate.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace graphical user interface to design the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application open with visible toolbars, property browsers, and canvas interactions, rather than terminal commands executing a script.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the CAD software by writing the .slvs file directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to paste raw XML/text data to create the .slvs file.

integrity.description: The agent progressively built the model rather than loading a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the step-by-step creation of the sketch, application of constraints, and the extrusion process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is strictly /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/cam_plate.slvs. The spline must have a minimum of 6 control points corresponding to the waypoints. The extrusion depth must be exactly 10 mm.
